checks.name: Public password reset rejects previously issued access and refresh tokens
Admin-triggered reset followed by password reset rejects previously issued access and refresh tokens
Support hard-reset immediately rejects previously issued access and refresh tokens

assertionResults.summary: Old sessions were rejected after public reset, admin-reset completion, and support hard-reset on the runtime API.

checks.name: Public forgot response is generic and reset link works

observed.forgotMessage: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent

checks.name: Admin force-reset response does not leak temporary credentials and delivered reset link works
Support hard-reset response does not leak temporary credentials and preserves credential email behavior

assertionResults.summary: Public forgot/reset, admin force-reset, and support hard-reset all delivered recovery emails and kept credentials out of API bodies on the runtime API.
